steps.title: Apply the perimeter formula
steps.content:
The perimeter of a rectangle is $P = 2(\text{length} + \text{width})$. With the given dimensions (length $x + 35$, width $x$):
$$P = 2((x + 35) + x) = 2(2x + 35) = 4x + 70$$

steps.title: Convert the perimeter constraint to an inequality
steps.content:
The phrase at least 520 means the perimeter must be greater than or equal to 520 centimeters. Therefore:
$$4x + 70 \geq 520$$
This matches choice D — D is correct.
